items.speaker: K.F.
items.text: No sign of the glitch here. Come with me.

items.speaker: K.F.
items.text: Clock's ticking. The Agent could be on us any moment.

items.speaker: K.F.
items.text: Don't worry. A lot of the quests in games are like that. The first few attempts will always fail, and only the last one can succeed.

items.speaker: K.F.
items.text: The road is very close now. We will leave this place, {PlayerName}.
